steps.title: Identify what 'featured' describes
steps.content: The sentence says the photograph “featured a portrait.” The word “featured” is the verb describing what the photograph does with the image inside it. In context, a photograph that contains and shows an image must “feature” it—meaning to display it.

steps.title: Match the meaning
steps.content: ”Featured” means “displayed.” B) Questioned, C) Approved, and D) Ignored don't describe what a photograph does with an image. A is correct.
